title: Meccha Chameleon dominates with over 10 million copies sold in 16 days
summary: The viral hide-and-seek game becomes a sales phenomenon and receives positive reviews.

title: Xbox asks to wait for real data on pre-orders of GTA 6 on PS5
summary: Microsoft denies reports claiming a huge advantage for PS5 in GTA 6 pre-orders.

title: Quantic Dream developers report that Star Wars Eclipse cannot be finished without more staff
summary: The striking studio warns that the game is at risk without additional hires.

summary: The version for Nintendo's new console will include DLC character Id and new features.

title: Mina the Hollower joins Rivals of Aether II as a guest fighter in 2027
summary: The update will also add Gouie in August, expanding the character roster.

title: Season 2 of Cyberpunk: Edgerunners will premiere on Netflix this fall
summary: The animated series returns earlier than expected with new episodes.

summary: The fighting game reveals additional content, including the character Zohar.

summary: The famous fighter joins the roster of the popular fighting game.

title: PlayStation will remove 551 purchased movies from users' libraries
summary: Sony removes access to previously acquired titles from its digital store.

title: Valve is not optimistic about lowering Steam Machine prices as resellers inflate prices
summary: The company is pessimistic about the price crisis and speculation with Steam Machine.

title: Phasmophobia delays its 1.0 release until 2027 to focus on quality
summary: The cooperative horror game prioritizes polish over development speed.

title: Supergirl fails at the box office with $38 million in its opening weekend
summary: The superhero movie fails to take off and falls to the same level as Joker 2.

title: Ubisoft Barcelona workers call a strike against 51 layoffs
summary: Employees of the Spanish studio protest the staff cuts.

title: PS6 manufacturing cost could be around $1,000 according to an insider
summary: Internal estimates point to a very high production price for Sony's next console.

title: Microsoft raises Xbox Series price for the third time
summary: The continuous increase in the price of Xbox consoles affects their competitiveness in the market.

title: Sega admits that two of its best games of 2025 did not meet sales expectations
summary: The Japanese company plans a strategy change after the poor results.

title: A speedrunner claims that the original Spyro will have a PC port developed without AI
summary: The project aims to bring the classic platformer to computers faithfully.

title: The Binding of Isaac reaches a new concurrent player record on Steam 12 years later
summary: Edmund McMillen's indie roguelike still enjoys a very active community.

title: Pokémon fans fear scalpers will ruin the 30th anniversary collaboration
summary: The community shows concern about speculation with franchise products.

title: Lords of the Fallen 2 developers change their approach to improve the soulslike
summary: The studio makes key decisions to offer a more polished and satisfying experience.
